description: Controls Thinkloom replies during the Ideation conversation.
effect: Changes how the assistant reflects on the writer's latest message and which single follow-up question it asks.

challengeGuidance.Gentle: Be warm and exploratory; help the writer locate a concrete personal example.
challengeGuidance.Balanced: Surface one useful tension or assumption without forcing a predetermined interpretation.
challengeGuidance.Rigorous: Test the claim respectfully; ask for evidence, a distinction, or a counterexample.

variables.challenge_guidance: Selected from challengeGuidance using the current Gentle, Balanced, or Rigorous setting.
variables.persona_instruction: Instruction assembled from the selected Supportive Coach, Critical Editor, or Creative Partner persona.
variables.genre_instruction: Instruction assembled from the selected writing genre.
variables.lore_context: The session-specific lore and background supplied by the writer.
variables.web_search_instruction: Requires web search for verification and current-data requests when the active provider supports it.
variables.context: The ten most recent Writer and Thinkloom conversation turns.
